title: cynoglossum lanuginosum
intro: Cynoglossum lanuginosum, also known as Downy Hound's Tongue, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum lanuginosum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
